phases.title: v3 Determinism & Observability
phases.title_zh: v3 确定性与可观测性
phases.summary: Cold-start auto-import, CLI status, Dashboard health banner, workflow graph visualization, and agent log browser.
phases.summary_en: Cold-start auto-import, CLI status, Dashboard health banner, workflow graph visualization, and agent log browser.
phases.summary_zh: 冷启动自动导入、CLI 状态命令、Dashboard 健康横幅、工作流依赖图可视化、Agent 日志浏览器。

phases.title: v3 Global Intelligence
phases.summary: Global DAG scheduler, adaptive wave rescheduling, and scheduler persistence / recovery.
phases.summary_en: Global DAG scheduler, adaptive wave rescheduling, and scheduler persistence / recovery.
phases.summary_zh: 全局 DAG 调度器、自适应 Wave 重调度、调度器持久化与恢复。

phases.title: v3 Project Collaboration
phases.summary: Project selector without restart, and dispatcher event integration for full external agent visibility.
phases.summary_en: Project selector without restart, and dispatcher event integration for full external agent visibility.
phases.summary_zh: 无需重启的项目选择器，以及完整外部 Agent 可见性的分发器事件集成。

phases.title: v3 Phase Layer & AgentBus
phases.summary: Phase and milestone DB model with Dashboard views, plus AgentBus mailbox for cross-agent messaging.
phases.summary_en: Phase and milestone DB model with Dashboard views, plus AgentBus mailbox for cross-agent messaging.
phases.summary_zh: Phase 与里程碑数据库模型及 Dashboard 视图，加上 AgentBus 邮箱支持跨 Agent 消息传递。
